caption: A man wearing a pink sleeveless shirt and black shorts practices basketball in an indoor gym. The gym features a polished wooden floor with a blue painted key and green semicircles, complemented by blue walls and blue tiered seating in the background. Two basketball hoops are visible, one centered and one on the left. The man starts in a low, athletic stance, preparing to move. He then transitions into an upright position, holding a basketball in both hands near his waist. As the sequence continues, he begins a shooting motion, extending his arms upward. Finally, he follows through with the shot, leaning forward with his right arm extended toward the hoop as the ball leaves his hand. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
